deterministic_evidence.scope: Canonical Plugin distribution, guarded target synchronization, target governance verification, Router Core, MCP bundle, release artifacts, documentation, site smoke, visual, Windows, macOS, and Linux contracts

behavior_evidence.basis: The frozen source adds canonical generated Plugin distribution and target-governance controls, replaces MCP dynamic schema compilation with the SDK cfworker validator provider, and updates release contracts. Router Core routing logic, MCP tool semantics, persisted schema, and evaluation scoring remain unchanged. Deterministic Router Core, MCP, artifact, and cross-platform contracts passed; the reviewed V2.0.0 behavior evidence remains the bounded reference rather than being relabeled as a new run.

known_limitations: This distribution-governance patch does not establish a new real-model behavior qualification and does not claim an additional routing-quality result.
Real Skill activation, token reduction, and task outcome remain unobservable in the inherited routing-contract evidence.

The MCP SDK currently carries a documented, upstream-tracked Moderate @hono/node-server dependency exception; the bundled Plugin starts MCP stdio only and does not start an HTTP listener or static-file middleware.

release_decision.basis: The frozen source passed deterministic local and GitHub Windows, macOS, and Linux release gates; target governance was verified; and the patch does not modify routing behavior.
